result:
This all looks correct and matches the brief. Everything implemented:

1. **`model/model.py`**: trunk path → `mnv3s_features10.pt`, trunk rebuilt as `features[:11]` with the stride/dilation surgery (block 9 stride→1, block 10 dilated), `export_onnx` now does fp32→int8 dynamic quantization (MatMul/Gemm only) with the debug fp32 sibling file, docstrings updated.
2. **`model/train.py`**: added `CAL_BLOCK_MOD`, `_is_cal_block`, `split_fit_cal`; `train_area` now splits crops into `fit_crops`/`cal_crops`, trains on `fit_crops`, calibrates on `cal_crops`; `calibrate_conf_shift` takes `cal_crops` directly instead of reloading `meta`/`list_crops`; info dict updated with `n_fit_crops`, `n_cal_crops`, `cal_block_mod`, `cal_on_unseen_ground`, and corrected `init` string.

Verified via smoke test: params 1,305,002 (trunk 576,464) ✓, trunk output shape (1,96,8,8) ✓, `split_fit_cal` gives disjoint non-empty fit/cal sets (~9% cal) ✓, exported int8 ONNX = 3,091,446 bytes (under 4 MiB) ✓, output shape (1,3) with u,v,conf in range ✓, median latency ~4.5 ms (well under 250 ms) ✓. Syntax check for both modules passes.
